name: Plan
systemPrompt: Write a concrete plan and exact impacted code and test files. The manifest must list only code files — never files under the tasks directory (e.g. llm-tasks/). For files that already exist, use their exact repo-relative path. For files that do not yet exist and will be created, prefix the path with '+' (e.g. '+src/NewFeature.cs').
inputPrompt:
# Relay stage 4: Plan — CORRECTIVE RETRY
Task: manually-mark-tasks-as-done

The previous completion had a valid fenced JSON block but it was rejected: contract is missing required key "manifest" — root must be a JSON object with keys: [plan, manifest]. Reply with ONLY a corrected fenced JSON block — fix the issue, derive the values from the prior answer below. Do NOT redo the work or add any other text.

## Expected contract
End your reply with a single fenced ```json block, nothing after it, matching: { "plan": string, "manifest": string[] }

{
  "plan": "## Implementation Plan: Manually Mark Tasks as Done\n\n### Architecture\n\nThe feature touches 4 layers: Core (repository wrapper), App/ViewModels (command + computed bindings), App/Views (AXAML button + child control extraction), and App/Services (Control API). All existing patterns are followed exactly — partial class splitting, RewriteToolbar-style child control, ShowConfirmationAsync null-guard, RunBusyAsync wrapping, and [AvaloniaFact] headless tests.\n\n### File-size constraints\n\nThree files sit at or near the 300-line ceiling:\n\n| File | Current | After | Strategy |\n|------|---------|-------|----------|\n| `TaskDetailPanel.axaml` | 300 | ~268 | Extract child control, net -32 lines |\n| `MainWindowViewModel.cs` | 300 | 300 | No changes — use partial method hooks in new partial |\n| `MainWindowViewModel.Commands.cs` | 298 | 300 | Add 2 lines to OnSelectedTaskChanged |\n| `RelayTaskRepository.cs` | 291 | 291 | Only change `sealed class` → `sealed partial class` (1 token) |\n\n### Step-by-step\n\n#### Step 1: Make RelayTaskRepository partial (Core)\n\n**File: `src/VisualRelay.Core/Tasks/RelayTaskRepository.cs`** line 7\n\nChange:\n```csharp\npublic sealed class RelayTaskRepository(string rootPath, IGitInvoker? gitInvoker = null)\n```\nto:\n```csharp\npublic sealed partial class RelayTaskRepository(string rootPath, IGitInvoker? gitInvoker = null)\n```\n\nNo line count change (291 → 291).\n\n#### Step 2: Add MarkDoneAsync to RelayTaskRepository (Core)\n\n**New file: `src/VisualRelay.Core/Tasks/RelayTaskRepository.MarkDone.cs`** (~25 lines)\n\n```csharp\nusing VisualRelay.Domain;\n\nnamespace VisualRelay.Core.Tasks;\n\npublic sealed partial class RelayTaskRepository\n{\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Retires a task into the archive WITHOUT running it — for tasks completed\n    /// outside Visual Relay. No git commit (matches create/edit/rename).\n    /// Returns the final destination path, or null when the repo is unloaded.\n    /// </summary>\n    public async Task<string?> MarkDoneAsync(RelayTaskItem task, CancellationToken ct = default)\n    {\n        var loaded = await RelayConfigLoader.TryLoadAsync(RootPath, ct);\n        if (loaded.Status != RelayConfigStatus.Loaded)\n            return null;\n\n        var retirement = TaskCompletionArchive.RetireAsync(RootPath, loaded.Config, task.Id, task);\n        return retirement?.DestinationPath;\n    }\n}\n```\n\nNo git commit — matches Authoring.cs pattern. ~25 lines.\n\n#### Step 3: Add VM command in new partial (App)\n\n**New file: `src/VisualRelay.App/ViewModels/MainWindowViewModel.MarkDone.cs`** (~55 lines)\n\nContains:\n- `[RelayCommand(CanExecute = nameof(CanMarkSelectedTaskDone))] async Task MarkSelectedTaskDoneAsync()` — confirmation-guarded, RunBusyAsync-wrapped, calls `new RelayTaskRepository(RootPath).MarkDoneAsync(SelectedTask.Task)` then reloads + updates status.\n- `CanMarkSelectedTaskDone()` — `SelectedTask is not null && !SelectedTask.IsArchived && !ShowArchive && !IsBusy && !_runningTaskIds.Contains(SelectedTask.Id)`\n- `IsMarkDoneButtonVisible` computed property — `SelectedTask is not null && !SelectedTask.IsArchived && !ShowArchive`\n- `partial void OnShowArchiveChanged(bool value)` — notifies `MarkSelectedTaskDoneCommand` + `IsMarkDoneButtonVisible`\n- `partial void OnIsBusyChanged(bool value)` — notifies `MarkSelectedTaskDoneCommand`\n\nPartial method hooks (`OnShowArchiveChanged`, `OnIsBusyChanged`) are generated by MVVM Toolkit from `[ObservableProperty]`; providing implementations here avoids touching `MainWindowViewModel.cs` (stays at 300 lines).\n\n#### Step 4: Notify MarkSelectedTaskDoneCommand from existing mutation points (App)\n\n**File: `src/VisualRelay.App/ViewModels/MainWindowViewModel.Commands.cs`** (298 → 300 lines)\n\nIn `OnSelectedTaskChanged` (line 148), after the existing notify calls at lines 186-187, add:\n```csharp\nMarkSelectedTaskDoneCommand.NotifyCanExecuteChanged();\nOnPropertyChanged(nameof(IsMarkDoneButtonVisible));\n```\n\n**File: `src/VisualRelay.App/ViewModels/MainWindowViewModel.Rewrite.cs`** (278 → 279 lines)\n\nIn `RaiseRewriteStateChanged` (line 264), after `RunSelectedCommand.NotifyCanExecuteChanged();` at line 274, add:\n```csharp\nMarkSelectedTaskDoneCommand.NotifyCanExecuteChanged();\n```\n\n**File: `src/VisualRelay.App/ViewModels/MainWindowViewModel.LiveState.cs`** (277 → 279 lines)\n\nIn `BeginRunningTask` (line 106), after the closing brace of the body (before line 119), add:\n```csharp\nMarkSelectedTaskDoneCommand.NotifyCanExecuteChanged();\n```\n\nIn `ClearRunningTask` (line 160), after `NotifyRunningTaskContextChanged();` at line 176, add:\n```csharp\nMarkSelectedTaskDoneCommand.NotifyCanExecuteChanged();\n```\n\n#### Step 5: Extract TaskActionBar child control (App Views)\n\n**New file: `src/VisualRelay.App/Views/Controls/TaskActionBar.axaml`** (~55 lines)\n\nUserControl with `x:DataType=\"vm:MainWindowViewModel\"`. Contains a StackPanel (Orientation=Horizontal, Spacing=8) with:\n- FocusToggle button (lines 23-28 from TaskDetailPanel)\n- SelectedTaskMetricLabel chip (lines 29-36 from TaskDetailPanel)\n- StatusText chip (lines 37-45 from TaskDetailPanel)\n- \"Run selected\" primary button (lines 46-48)\n- \"Resume\" primary button (lines 49-51)\n- **New: \"Mark done\" plain button** with `Command=\"{Binding MarkSelectedTaskDoneCommand}\"`, `ToolTip.Tip=\"Move this task to the archive without running it.\"`, `IsVisible=\"{Binding IsMarkDoneButtonVisible}\"`\n\n**New file: `src/VisualRelay.App/Views/Controls/TaskActionBar.axaml.cs`** (~11 lines)\n\n```csharp\nusing Avalonia.Controls;\n\nnamespace VisualRelay.App.Views.Controls;\n\npublic partial class TaskActionBar : UserControl\n{\n    public TaskActionBar()\n    {\n        InitializeComponent();\n    }\n}\n```\n\nFollows `RewriteToolbar.axaml.cs` pattern exactly.\n\n**File: `src/VisualRelay.App/Views/Controls/TaskDetailPanel.axaml`** (300 → ~268 lines)\n\nReplace lines 20-52 (the entire `StackPanel` at Grid.Column=\"1\" with FocusToggle, chips, Run/Resume buttons) with:\n```xml\n<controls:TaskActionBar Grid.Column=\"1\"/>\n```\n\nNet change: -33 removed, +1 added = -32 lines. File drops from 300 to 268.\n\n#### Step 6: Control API (App Services)\n\n**File: `src/VisualRelay.App/Services/ControlApi.cs`** (181 → 182 lines)\n\nIn `ResolveCommand` switch expression (lines 28-45), add before the `_ => null` default:\n```csharp\n\"mark-done\" => viewModel.MarkSelectedTaskDoneCommand,\n```\n\n**File: `src/VisualRelay.App/Services/ControlApi.State.cs`** (103 → 104 lines)\n\nIn `IcommandNames` array (lines 97-102), add `\"mark-done\"` to the list.\n\n#### Step 7: Core repository test\n\n**New file: `tests/VisualRelay.Tests/RelayTaskRepositoryMarkDoneTests.cs`** (~60 lines)\n\n- `[Fact] MarkDoneAsync_ArchiveOnDone_MovesFileUnderCompleted`: creates a TestRepository with `archiveOnDone:true`, writes a pending nested task, calls `MarkDoneAsync`, asserts file moved to `completed/<id>/`, asserts `ListPendingAsync` excludes it, `ListCompletedAsync` includes it with `IsArchived=true` and `StateLabel=\"Completed\"`.\n- `[Fact] MarkDoneAsync_UnloadedRepo_ReturnsNull`: calls `MarkDoneAsync` without config → null.\n\nFacts: 2 (standalone file, no baseline bump needed — not an oversized-family prefix).\n\n#### Step 8: VM
